coverage_rule: one replay fixture and expected payload per registered SBSQL surface
every fixture must cover parser_parse_only parser_bind_lower diagnostic and server_admission
every executable surface must cover udr_sql_to_sblr engine_behavior and full_route
every nonexecutable surface must fail closed without engine mutation or full-route execution
every datatype function operator and variable surface must have replay coverage
every non-expression command and statement surface must have replay coverage
every SBLR operation family must be represented and route-classified
every engine gap must be closed by engine API/SBLR family gate or cluster fail-closed gate
every reference alias must map to native behavior or exact reference-profile refusal
concatenated dynamic SQL must resolve UUIDs through SBSQL UDR then admit and execute only as SBLR
